description: Folds a wireframe cut pattern into its 3D solid shape. Takes a reference to a cut expression and animates the flat pattern assembling into the corresponding 3D form.
utility: Fold a cut pattern into a 3D solid

arguments.name: cutRef
arguments.description: Reference to the cut expression to fold

examples.scenario: Fold a corner-cut sheet into a box
examples.expression:
sh_1 = sheetrect(at(6,9), view(12.2,19.3), 10, 8, c(crimson), fc(cyan), fo(0.2), so(0.4))
cut_1 = cut(at(6,9), sh_1, cuttype(corner), 1.5, fc(lightblue), c(cyan), fo(0.2))
fold_1 = fold(at(6,32), cut_1, view(14,14), c(crimson), fc(cyan), fo(0.3))

examples.scenario: Fold a sector-cut circular sheet into a cone
examples.expression:
sc_1 = sheetcircle(at(2,6), view(14,14), 4, c(navy), fc(lightyellow), fo(0.5))
cut_1 = cut(at(2,14), sc_1, cuttype(sector), 90)
fold_1 = fold(at(2,28), cut_1, view(14,14), c(navy), fc(lightyellow), fo(0.5))
